overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a concrete industrial facility. The player character moves through corridors with bullet-riddled walls, examines a security door, exits to a rooftop with ocean views, and explores a vehicle bay containing a large tracked APC.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete service corridor with bullet holes

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the corridor with weapon drawn, scanning the walls

entered.detail: grey concrete walls with visible bullet holes and wear marks
rectangular overhead light panels illuminating the corridor
white utility cart with supplies parked against the left wall
security door with distinctive red neon trim lighting
numerous bullet impact marks scattered across the concrete surface

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow concrete corridor illuminated by overhead skylights. The walls show signs of recent combat with scattered bullet holes. A cleaning cart sits against the left wall as the player approaches a security door with red neon trim at the end of the hall.

events.description: peering through glass door into red-lit interior room
turning away from the door to return down the corridor

agents.ego_description: pausing to examine the door interior, then turning back toward the corridor

notable_agents.action: deceased character in purple uniform lying against the wall

entered.detail: visible through the glass door, an interior space with red ambient lighting and industrial equipment
fallen character in purple uniform with yellow boots slumped against the wall

segments.scene_description: At the security door, the player looks through the glass into a red-lit interior space before turning back. A deceased NPC in purple uniform becomes visible against the right wall as the perspective shifts away from the door.

events.description: passing the deceased NPC while proceeding toward the exit

agents.ego_description: proceeding past the body toward the bright exit, weapon still at the ready

entered.detail: large concrete opening leading to bright outdoor area

segments.scene_description: Moving back through the corridor toward a bright exit archway. The deceased NPC is left behind as the player approaches the transition to the outdoor rooftop area, with daylight becoming visible through the opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop vehicle bay with ocean overlook

events.description: exiting the building into bright midday sunlight
approaching the large tracked APC parked in the bay

agents.ego_description: emerging into sunlight and approaching the vehicle while scanning the ocean view

entered.detail: bright blue sky with scattered white clouds
expansive view of blue ocean visible through the concrete structure
large grey armored personnel carrier with treads parked in the bay
sloped concrete structure leading up to the vehicle bay
natural rock formation with some vegetation visible behind the building

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a sunlit rooftop concrete area with a stunning ocean view. A large tracked APC is parked in a covered bay. The player approaches the vehicle and looks out over the water through a large opening in the structure.

events.description: circumnavigating the APC to approach the far entrance

agents.ego_description: moving around the vehicle toward a hexagonal entrance with red lighting

entered.detail: futuristic security entrance with hexagonal frame and red neon lighting
staircase leading upward along the left wall
coiled cables and equipment stacked near the stairs

segments.scene_description: Moving around the parked APC within the covered bay area. The ocean view disappears behind concrete walls as the player approaches a hexagonal security entrance framed with red neon lighting, with metal stairs visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, battle-scarred interior toward a bright coastal rooftop before returning to a secure industrial bay. It begins in a narrow concrete corridor under overhead skylights, passing a cleaning cart and bullet-riddled walls toward a red-trimmed security door. After a brief pause to peer into the red-lit room beyond the glass, the camera pivots away to reveal a deceased NPC in a purple uniform before retreating back through the hall toward a bright archway. As the perspective emerges from the dim corridor, the scene opens into a sunlit rooftop area featuring a stunning ocean view and a large tracked APC parked in a covered bay. The movement then shifts around the vehicle, causing the vista to disappear behind concrete walls as the camera finally approaches a hexagonal security entrance framed in red neon.
